methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: US-Iran clash and Syria crises amplify Turkiye's border threats
bullets: US forces rescued pilots in Iran after an F-15E downing, killing five Iranians during the operation.
Israel's army admitted underestimating Hezbollah and Iran's military capabilities, revealing regional miscalculation.
Syria faces humanitarian erasure of Syriacs and diplomatic rift with Gulf states over embassy protests.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Watch for Iranian retaliation or Syrian protest escalation near borders.
